title: When AI Gets It Wrong
description: Even the smartest AIs make mistakes. Learn how to spot them — and why that makes you the important one!

steps.content: Finn asked an AI chatbot: 'Who won the school football final?' The AI replied confidently with a name — but it was completely wrong! The game happened last week.

steps.question: Why did the AI give a wrong answer?
options: It was trying to trick Finn
It only knows things up to a certain date

steps.content: The AI wasn't lying — it just didn't know about events after it was trained. This is called a knowledge cutoff. All AIs have one.

steps.instruction: Which of these questions is BEST to ask an AI?
options: What happened in the news today?
What is the capital of France?
Did my team win last night?
What is the latest phone model?

steps.content: Finn always double-checks important facts from AI now. That makes him a smart AI user — and that's a superpower! 🔍
